title: ING Plants
description: Plants just like in real life.
body:
ING Plants
🌿 ING PLants – The Ultimate Botany Mod for Minecraft! 🌸

Dive into a rich and realistic plant-filled world with this mod focused on global flora. Whether you're a nature enthusiast or just looking for more vibrant landscapes, this mod adds hundreds of real-world flowers, trees, and plants, inspired by species from across the globe!

🌱 Key Features:
Massive Plant Expansion: Adds a wide variety of real-life plant species — rare trees, exotic flowers, medicinal herbs, and more.

Enhanced Biomes: Explore forests, plains, and jungles brought to life with increased biodiversity and natural beauty.

Real-Life Plant Effects: Some plants come with effects based on their real-world properties!
→ A flower known for calming effects might grant you regeneration.
→ An energizing plant could give you a speed or strength boost, and more.

Botanical Immersion: Pick, plant, grow, and explore a world alive with vibrant, realistic vegetation.

🌎 Mod Goal:
To bring the incredible diversity of the Earth’s plant life into Minecraft, while also adding meaningful gameplay mechanics based on real-world botany. This mod is designed to be both educational and fun, letting players discover global flora in an immersive and interactive way.
